overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a foggy mountain path and entering a torchlit stone tunnel. The clip transitions from cool, misty outdoor atmosphere to a warm, fire-lit interior with wooden support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain path alongside steep cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path toward the stone tunnel entrance ahead

entered.detail: large stone archway built into the mountain, serving as tunnel entrance
steep rocky cliff face running alongside the path
fog-covered mountain slopes with sparse vegetation
broken wooden fence or barrier beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path hugging a cliff wall in a foggy mountain environment. The stone archway of a tunnel entrance looms ahead in the mist, with broken wooden barricades visible along the roadside.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel entrance with guard post

events.description: character passes under the stone archway from foggy outdoors into the darker tunnel interior
passing a guard NPC standing at the tunnel entrance wearing a horned helmet

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway entrance into the tunnel, passing a guard on the right

notable_agents.action: guard standing with arms crossed near the entrance, wearing a distinctive horned helmet and chainmail

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the tunnel interior walls
burning torch mounted on the wall casting warm orange light
thick wooden beam supporting the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters the stone tunnel, transitioning from the foggy exterior to the sheltered interior. A guard wearing a horned helmet stands watch near the entrance as warm torchlight begins to replace the cool natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: torchlit stone mine tunnel with wooden supports

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit tunnel toward the bright exit light visible in the far distance

entered.detail: heavy timber posts supporting the tunnel ceiling at regular intervals
bright white light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the long stone tunnel, illuminated by wall-mounted torches that cast dancing shadows on the rough walls. Wooden support beams line the passage as the character walks toward the bright light at the distant exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty mountain cliffside into the warm, torchlit depths of a stone tunnel. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path hugging a cliff wall, where broken wooden barricades line the road and a stone archway looms through the dense fog. As the character passes through the entrance, the cool natural light of the exterior shifts into a sheltered interior, passing a guard in a horned helmet. The scene then expands into a long stone passage where wall-mounted torches replace the mist with dancing shadows and warm light. Finally, the camera follows the character past heavy wooden support beams as he advances toward the bright glow of a distant exit.
